heading: Financial assistance
label: 10169 Financial assistance
text: The provisions of section 10136(c) or 10138(b) of this title with respect to grants, technical assistance, and other financial assistance shall apply to the State, to affected Indian tribes and to affected units of local government in the case of a monitored retrievable storage facility in the same manner as for a repository.
notes: Codificationand added identical sections.Pub. L. 100–202Pub. L. 100–203
